title: Indestructible Items
description: This plugin makes all items indestructible by making it so they cant explode or burn
body:
# Info:

This plugin makes all items indestructible by making it so they cant explode or burn

## Why?

2 reasons. 

1. Why not?
2. Why let players suffer? If they kill someone in the nether their loot shouldnt be burnt! or if they killed someone to a trap, why let all their items just disappear?

### How To Use

By doing /indestructible (with op of course) **ALL** items are now unable to be exploded/burnt.

/indestructible blacklist add (minecraft item) will allow you to make certain items able to be exploded/burnt

/indestructible despawn on/off will make items unbable to despawn or make them despawn like normal (default is off)

All commands need Operator!
